description: MassFlow (gravity flow / caving) reference documentation: shared 9.0 kernel constitutive models and range filters used in coupled mechanical analysis.

constitutive-models.name: Constitutive Models (Zone)
constitutive-models.description: MassFlow zone constitutive material model properties for coupled mechanical analysis — mohr-coulomb, drucker-prager, hoek-brown, cam-clay, creep models, etc. Property vocabulary for 'zone cmodel assign' + 'zone property'. Shared 9.0 FLAC3D kernel (docs via _common).
constitutive-models.summary: 38 zone material models (shared with FLAC3D via _common; 5 models not yet documented)

range-elements.name: Range Elements
range-elements.description: Geometric and logical 'range ...' filters (cylinder, sphere, plane, position, group, id, polygon, union, not, ...) used to scope any MassFlow command. Shared 9.0 kernel.
